name: Unmasked: An Inner Journey
short_description: Unmasked: An Inner Journey is an emotion-driven adventure platformer told without dialogues. Become a manifestation of a restless mind, and go on a journey to find closure.
detailed_description:
A man sits alone in a shack, deep in thought. Back and forth through the years his mind wanders. Forever a craftsman, he starts carving a mask. And as he looks at it, he remembers…

Unmasked: An Inner Journey is an emotion-driven adventure platformer that takes you on an extraordinary journey of self-discovery. You play as a manifestation of a mind fighting inner fears and painful memories. As you delve into the Craftsman’s consciousness, you will help him accept his past, ultimately finding closure.



The story of Unmasked: An Inner Journey is told without dialogue. Instead, the narrative unfolds through a series of carefully crafted vignettes that hint at events from the Craftsman’s past. The game explores themes of memory and identity, aiming to immerse the player in a state of longing and reflection.

While the game’s focus is its emotional impact and story, Unmasked: An Inner Journey blends action, puzzles, and chase sequences to achieve it. You will fight creatures that eerily resemble your hero, use wind gusts and giant machines to overcome various obstacles and confront monsters that guard the deepest secrets of the Craftsman’s psyche.

Unmasked: An Inner Journey features 5 distinct levels, each brought to life with beautiful artwork, immersive soundscape, and captivating music.

Key Features

  • A Story That Stays With You. Experience a touching tale of a life remembered. The emotionally charged narrative is conveyed entirely through visuals, music, and character vignettes — no dialogue needed.
  • A Beautiful World to Explore. Unmasked: An Inner Journey offers vividly colored, meticulously crafted levels that become windows into the Craftsman's inner world. From the shimmering beauty of a sunlit river to the cold darkness of forgotten caves, these small worlds will stay with you.
  • Psychology with a Punch. Run, jump, fight, and solve puzzles that test your skills and reflexes. While Unmasked isn’t meant to be a difficult game, it still provides a satisfying challenge.
  • Gorgeous Music. Nothing puts you in a reflective mood quite like music. Unmasked: An Inner Journey features an original soundtrack, with tracks ranging from soothing to bittersweet, perfectly complementing the story.

supported_languages: English, Ukrainian, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil
